# Troubleshooting Title

Owner: Name or role  
Last reviewed: YYYY-MM-DD  
Status: Draft, active, deprecated, or example

## Symptom

Write the exact error message or observable behavior someone might search for.

## Affected Systems

- Workflow, instrument, database, cluster, or software.
- Known versions or dates affected.

## Likely Causes

| Cause | How to Check | Fix |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Example cause | Example command or observation | Example fix |

## Checks

example-diagnostic-command

## Fix

Document the safest common fix first.

## Prevention

## Escalation

Name when to stop and who should be contacted.
